_comment: 10x narrowed ranges around the canonical midpoints for fast-converge diagnostic runs. Use this when verifying the RL plumbing before tackling the full distribution.

pulse._comment_beta: Centered on the true raised-cosine DRAG optimum beta=0.5 (NOT 1.0 — the textbook beta=1 result assumes a Gaussian envelope). 10x narrower than full: half-span 0.05.
